sampleData.note: Dummy data for export preview and PDF/source comparison only. Do not treat these values as imported organization facts.

values.MotionText: the attached policy be approved and added to the society records

exactTemplate.html:
{CorporationName}
                                         (the "Corporation")

 Policy Name:                  {PolicyName}

 Policy Number:                {PolicyNumber}

 Effective Date:               {PolicyEffectiveDate}

 The charitable purposes of the Corporation are to receive and maintain a fund or funds and to
 apply all or part of the principal and income therefore, by way of a formal grants program to
 qualified donees in the furtherance of the following charitable purposes beneficial to the
 community including: [CUSTOMIZATION REQUIRED: include list of charitable purposes
 approved by CRA in your charitable registration documents].

 The objects of the Corporation shall be limited to carrying on purposes which entitle the
 Corporation to become and remain a "registered Canadian charitable organization or public
 Corporation" as defined by the provisions of the Income Tax Act (Canada).

 Each year, the Community Corporation will allocate salaries and benefits to its charitable,
 fundraising and management functions, based on job descriptions, and prorate the operating
 expenditures on either a direct or prorated basis based on the salary allocation. This information
 will be conveyed to the auditor.

 Monitoring:                   This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate}.

 Board Acceptance:             This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors
                               of the Corporation on {EffectiveDate}, as confirmed by
                               {#SoleVotDir}the signature of the sole director of the
                               Corporation below.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}the
                               counterpart signatures of each of the directors of the Corporation
                               below.{/MultiVotDir}

 {#VotingDirectors}


 {SignerTag}
 _________________________________________
 {Director-Name}{/VotingDirectors}


Policy {PolicyNumber} - {PolicyName} - {CorporationName} - {PolicyEffectiveDate}

comparison.method: Normalized text equality between extracted source PDF text and the generated canonical template text.

dummySampleComparison.method: Normalized keyword overlap between extracted source PDF text and the dummy-filled remade template. This flags drift only; it is not a legal-equivalence review.

remadeTemplate.summary: Charitable fund purposes, qualified donee grants, CRA-approved purposes, and allocation of salaries and operating costs.

Policy {PolicyNumber} - {PolicyName} - {CorporationName} - {PolicyEffectiveDate}

sections.heading: Purpose of Funds
paragraphs: Funds are received, maintained, and applied to the organization's charitable or nonprofit purposes as described in the governing documents and applicable fund agreements.

sections.heading: Eligible Uses
paragraphs: Fund principal and income may be used for approved programs, grants, qualified donee gifts, or other lawful activities that advance the stated purposes.

sections.heading: Allocation
paragraphs: Salary, benefit, fundraising, management, and operating allocations are documented using a reasonable board-approved allocation basis and provided to the auditor or reviewer when required.

structuredSummaryTemplate.html:
{PolicyName}

Organization: {CorporationName}

Policy number: {PolicyNumber}

Effective date: {PolicyEffectiveDate}

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Purpose of Funds

Funds are received, maintained, and applied to the organization's charitable or nonprofit purposes as described in the governing documents and applicable fund agreements.

Eligible Uses

Fund principal and income may be used for approved programs, grants, qualified donee gifts, or other lawful activities that advance the stated purposes.

Allocation

Salary, benefit, fundraising, management, and operating allocations are documented using a reasonable board-approved allocation basis and provided to the auditor or reviewer when required.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate} and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of {CorporationName} on {EffectiveDate}.

{#SoleVotDir}Approved by the sole voting director.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.{/MultiVotDir}

{#VotingDirectors}{SignerTag}
_________________________________________
{Director-Name}{/VotingDirectors}
